markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on next steps for the Anything account after a difficult client call.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Client Frustration:** The client is demanding immediate revenue results, a shift from their initial "long-term play" stance. This is likely driven by internal pressure (e.g., hitting a $7M revenue milestone) and competition from multiple other agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Core Problem:** Revenue tracking is impossible. The client lacks the necessary PostHog/Segment instrumentation and is unfamiliar with the GA events we're using, making it impossible to connect our work to their revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Immediate Action Plan:** Katya will send an urgent message outlining three non-negotiable next steps: 1) Client must grant access to PostHog & GSC, 2) Client must approve a new migration plan, and 3) Erik will join the next call to rebuild trust.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [**Strategic Response:** Kyle will develop a strategic projection to show how SEO can become a 2-3x revenue channel, including a programmatic content option to meet the client's desire for speed.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

## Topics

### Client Context & Frustration

  - [The client's CEO is demanding immediate revenue results, a shift from their initial framing of SEO as a "long-term play."](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Likely Drivers:**](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Internal Pressure:** The company recently hit a $7M revenue milestone, creating pressure for all channels to show direct, immediate impact.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Agency Competition:** The client works with multiple agencies (PR, paid ads, influencer), creating a competitive environment where each agency is trying to prove its value.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [**Communication Breakdown:** The CEO's frequent meeting absences (including the kickoff) and a third, unannounced website migration have created significant friction.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

### The Core Problem: Untrackable Revenue

  - [The client's demand for revenue attribution is impossible to fulfill.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The client lacks the necessary PostHog/Segment instrumentation to track organic traffic to signups and revenue. They are also unfamiliar with the GA events we are currently using.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Process Gap:** This issue highlights a need to validate client tracking capabilities more deeply during the strategy sprint, not just ask about them.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

### The Solution: A Multi-Pronged Plan

  - [**1. Rebuild Trust & Urgency (Katya & Erik)**](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [Katya will send an urgent message outlining three non-negotiable next steps for the client.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [Erik will join the next call to provide "air cover" for Katya, leveraging his existing rapport to rebuild trust and reinforce the long-term strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [**2. Strategic Projection (Kyle)**](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [Kyle will develop a strategic projection showing how SEO can become a 2-3x revenue channel.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [This will include scenarios (high, medium, low) and a programmatic content option to meet the client's desire for speed.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [**3. Process Improvements (Ella)**](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [**Retrospective:** Ella will add two items to the sprint retrospective:](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
          - [**Deeper Discovery:** Ask more questions about a client's broader business (e.g., other agencies, domain strategy) to proactively identify risks.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
          - [**Website Migrations:** Create a playbook for managing client website migrations with the required urgency.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:** Draft and send an urgent message to the client outlining the three non-negotiable next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [**Erik:** Join the next client call to support Katya and rebuild trust.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [**Kyle:** Develop the strategic projection with revenue scenarios and a programmatic content option.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [**Ella:** Add "deeper discovery" and "website migration playbook" to the sprint retrospective agenda.](https://fathom.video/share/xnG2Zsy3vBWg3H93v-cnRT2DVhC8svpZ?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
